entry.title: Re: Report Request: Vacant Positions Due to Employee Depa...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can create a Canvas report for this requirement. After finishing the column design, you must assign filters. One filter should check for vacant positions (set "Vacant" or "To Be Recruited" to "Yes" in the query filter). Another filter is to identify positions that were filled by employees who have since left the organization. For this, you should set the "Termination Date" to "is not null" in the incumbent information filter.

entry.title: Re: Error in entity 'C_PURCHASEORDERTP(CDS)': The table does not contain a row with the specified
entry.content:
I also got the same type of error 

Error in entity 'C_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORDTP(CDS)': Element ZZPSTYV missing in the entit

I followed as mentioned in point 2, I found that the field was missing in the draft table once maintained issue was resolved

 

1) Click on Message information and see the full message there may be more details about which object is missing 

or 

2) Go to IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE code search for the service name and refresh the metadata it gives a dump

go to ST22 and analyze the dump description there you can find a missing table or draft table where you need to append/extend and add the same field that you extended via CDS view

However extending the CDS view directly is not a good practice or approach in new versions of S4. You can make use of Key user extensibility custom field, logic approach which is a no-code-low code approach clean core strategy framework is capable of adding new fields in all dependent objects

entry.title: A list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dears,

Can you pls help me to find a list with irreversible customizing in S/4HANA?

I am much interested in MM, but would like to have a list of all.

Do you know if have such info provided by SAP?

BR,

Marina

entry.title: Re: Move the position of a UDF created by an Add-on
entry.content:
Hello,

I am a SAP B1 developer and that is what is going on:

1 - B1 keeps record of the fields position and try to set the Top and Left on the screen when the form is loaded.

2 - The AddOn (from a third party, so I assume you don't have the source code) overcome the position recorded in B1 after the form is loaded

You have two ways to go:

1 - Request the owner of the addon to change the behavior

2 - Write your own code (a second addon) to manipulate the position of the fields created by the third party addon

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Advanced Scheduler Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Deepak,

I have a requirement to set the scheduler which should run every 45mins. Could you please share a screenshot on how to set the configuration in the timer?

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Soumya Ranjan Pradhan

entry.title: AFFW stuck entries
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

There is a register in CO1P for backflush reason that not appears in COGI. When I display the confirmation, a message RU704427 "Highlighted items need to be processed" but any register in Goods Movements of the confirmation is highlighted. Apart of it, movements associated to production order are OK checking MB51.

In AFFW table appears this register but any message number, or error, etc is filled.

I tried to execute CORUPROC and CORUAFWP and the register remains equal stuck in CO1P.

I have checked notes and others posts here but I have not seen how to delete this register when CORUPROC/CORUAFWP doesn't run correctly for it.

Any help or what to check in this case?

Thanks!!

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hello @hariprasadgud ,

I’m very happy about the potential of the CTC and have a quick question about its roadmap.

As of 2025, we’ve adopted CTC as our preferred method for moving configurations between instances. However, while transferring roles, I encountered an error regarding tree security, which states: “The synchronization of tree security role assignments is not supported.”

This is proving to be a challenge for us, as quite some of our roles rely on tree security. It would be a game-changer if CTC could support syncing tree security role assignments.

Is there any plan on the roadmap to address this limitation? It’s currently a blocker for us in fully embracing CTC, and I’d love to know if this functionality is being considered for future updates.

Looking forward to your insights!

Thanks,
Roos🌹

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello Cláudia,

I am also from Brazil, Santa Catarina. We have groups in whats app for SAP B1 Consultants from the entire country to share questions. 

Best regards

entry.title: Resulttype of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[... ]" cannot be converted into the type of
entry.content:
Hello.

I have the following issue :

My requirement is define a TYPES with the following structure and a field additional , and then create a internal table of this type. called lt_fin

TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_displaydata_order,
    INCLUDE TYPE SFIOM_S_REPL_REQ_ORG_ASS_EXTND,
    persg       TYPE persg.
TYPES END OF gty_displaydata_order.

DATA :lt_fin  TYPE TABLE OF gty_displaydata_order .
IF lv_cont >= 2.
  APPEND LINES OF is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont - 1 ] TO lt_fin .
ELSEIF lv_cont = 1.
  APPEND is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont ] TO lt_fin.
ENDIF.

Initially I have a internal table is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment that receive as parameter with information information and I nee add to the table lt_fin only the two last record .

I need complete the information of the field persg that query of the table HRP1013 in the table lt_fin for each position that have in the field employee_class = 9.

however when want pass the two last record the system generate  the following error:

Result type of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[... ]" cannot be converted into the type of
"LT_FIN".

I share the following information

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Manag...
entry.content: Hallo Michael,

entry.title: Re: Upgrade from BI 4.2 to BI 4.3 - Which Service Pack an...
entry.content:
According to SAP note "3040109 - Installation/Update/Upgrade guidance for the BI Platform [2021]", it's recommended to go to the latest SP and patch available.

Version 4.3 is the only one currently supported by SAP. More info here: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/SBOP_BI_43.pdf

entry.title: Re: spool is not gettng generated when the form is triggered.
entry.content: Please ensure that the customer's email ID is not maintained, as the system will attempt to send an email instead of generating the spool.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Manag...
entry.content: Danke für Dein Feedback. Und ja, alles ist in Ordnung. Bei Dir auch? Viele Grüße Harry

entry.title: Re: Assigning WBS elements to a Service Order
entry.content:
Hi Soma,

as shown in your configuration, you have changed the account assignment category from 'R' to 'P'. Usually, only with the category 'R', the account assignment data from the service order will be transferred to the purchase requisition, which will look something like this: (account assignment object for the PR/PO is the service order)

In your case, since you have changed the value to 'P', the data from the service order will not be transferred to the PR, as the WBS Element association in the service order is only statistical. For more details on this topic, refer to my blog post here. So the recommended approach for the 3NI external procurement scenario is to keep the account assignment category as 'R' (service order), which will post all costs from the PO against the service order.

Best regards
Varun

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am from Brazil, state of Santa Catarina. We have many SAP B1 and S/4 HANA consultants here.

Best regards

entry.title: Silent Installer Installation Guide
entry.content:
You want to distribute i.e. the SAP Cloud Print Manager,Collaboration Window, Outlook for Business by Design via i.e. a Silent installation.

some examples are

/silent

/nodlg

 

for very Detailed information please have a look into the SAP Setup Guide 

https://help.sap.com/sapsetup

entry.title: Good receipt : Error msg : account 6* requires an assignment to a CO object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm getting this error message "account 6* requires an assignment to a CO object" when posting good receipt, can you please tell me what can be the reason ? 

The purchase order contains only items without any specific assignment category (No account assignment Tab available on ME21N for this PO document type).

PO items contain materials that are linked to profit center in materials master data, the expense GL accounts are linked to cost centers by profit center via OKB9.

I don't understand why the system is not able to get the correct cost center through Material master data and OKB9, is it the fact that no assignment category is set on the PO items ?

 

Thank you for your help!

 

Thank you so much!

Regards

entry.title: Re: Prorate based on Months not days
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,
indeed this is a very good idea and can be achieved with 3 steps:


1. You can use the duration component to calculate the number of full months during proration using the rating period start and end with the billing cycle start date as reference date. In order to calculate it in months you can specify the unit of measure as 'Month', with Rounding Rule 'Round to the Nearest' and an Increment of 1 month.

Remark: these date fields are standard fields as described in pricing configuration guide.

2. Then you convert the duration into a ratio together with a division by 12.

3. And finally apply this as proration factor in the Calculate function:



Remark: you need to ensure that subscription changes and cancellation are then only at month end (or at monthly anniversary days if it is an anniversary subscription). 

Best,
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Resulttype of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[...
entry.content:
You have 2 issues here:

First you try to append a field

is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment

to the internal table

lt_fin

which is defined as

DATA :lt_fin  TYPE TABLE OF gty_displaydata_order .

which doesn't work. You simply cannot append a field to a structure. It's a type mismatch.

Second (even if you resolve the type conflict) you would try to append a structure of type iTab1 to the iTab2 which have 2 totally different (differing by 1 field but still totally different to the compiler) layouts.

It's like tryting to append a line type line of MARA to a iTab type table of MARC for simplicity.

If you want to append the structure is_ee_org_ass_repl_req to lt_fin you have to either use MOVE-CORRESPONDING and then add the additional field manually or use some sort of VALUE #( ) construct.

entry.title: Re: FY variant under DRC (bi-monthly reporting)
entry.content: Hi Abhishek, thanks a lot but the problem seems to be in our Master Data. Need to request a creation of FY Variant "BM" in T009 table. Thanks a lot again.

entry.title: Product Compliance - SVT - affected applications versus exempted applications
entry.content:
Hello Michael and Sylvia, hi guys,
at level of my product I assign the related application of my (unpacked) product. So far so good.
A Compliance Requirement related to Substance Volume Tracking - e.g., EU REACH Registration Status, there are both "Affected Applications" and "Exempted Applications" available...

Question in brief: is the data element "Affected Application" considered anywhere in the solution?

Assumption: any Packaged Products that belong to an Unpackaged Product that does have at least one exempted application listed for a SVT relevant Compliance Requirement is not considered at all for (this CR) SVT calculation.
Question regular: so for what reason is the data point "Affected Application" required? So from understanding, others applications than "Industrial Chemicals" as, e.g., cosmetic, detergent, etc. are relevant for SVT Compliance Requirement EU REACH Registration Status, too. Aren't they?

Thanks
Harry

entry.title: Re: While implement OData using spring boot 3.0.1 , getting 500 while calling endpoint
entry.content: Hi, did you find any solutions for the mentioned problem? Could you kindly share, if you found one.

Here’s to more awesome collaborations ahead!

entry.title: Re: Goods Issue Movement Types different 961 and Z61 for...
entry.content: I already had done above configuration, but that was not working. Now my problem was solved using ABAP

entry.title: Re: Checklist for Service Procurement Integration SAP Fieldglass, Ariba and S/4HANA Solutions
entry.content:
Good start @BharathAJ. Best Wishes 👍 

Adding reference of this here - Procurement of Services in SAP Ariba

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP Uploading a package
entry.content:
1. Create a transport request in the source system, from SE80 on package node
  2. Copy the relevant files between data and cofiles directory of both Application Servers
  3. Trigger the import in target system : STMS, Extras, Other Request
  4. Change the original system of the package via SE03 (select objects of the package and use ok code MASS)

entry.title: Re: Measurement Document - Wrong Counter Reading differen...
entry.content: We somehow managed to resolve this. It seems the issue came from when a measurement document with zero counter reading difference was created. We reversed the measurement documents up until that document containing the zero difference. After the reversals, when a new measurement document was created, the issue was resolved.

entry.title: Re: Procurement of Services in SAP Ariba
entry.content: Kindly refer this post on related topic - Checklist for Service Procurement Integration SAP Fieldglass, Ariba and S/4HANA Solutions

entry.title: Re: While implement OData using spring boot 3.0.1 , getti...
entry.content:
Hi,
Kindly use this in the code instead of the current line:

initParameters.put("jakarta.ws.rs.Application", "org.apache.olingo.odata2.core.rest.app.ODataApplication");

Make sure this dependency is added in the pom and this should work fine then

entry.title: Re: Boost your Recruiting using embedded AI features
entry.content:
Dear @LisaRaff 

thanks for your question. Yes, you are right. Candidate can change / update / edit the skills in the Profile (but only if Quick Apply is disabled).

Recruiters / HM can ONLY SEE the skills and the matching and from where the skills are derived but they cannot change anything.

BR

Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @Rebecca_Bottomley,

please get certified in SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect | SAP Learning first. After passing this certification it will appear on SAP Learning - My Learning - Certification with the link to the stay certified assessement.

 

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have tried this and I can see:-

===================


21.01.2025 11:18:36
StartWait
OK
Worker Processes: started, pid=2014

*** All services have been started. ***
***
*** To stop and be able to safely start again use Ctrl-C
*** Or use the stop command with timeout: docker stop -t 7200 ...
***
*** Have fun! ***

===================

But When I login Using SAPGui after that I can NOT schedule "SGEN", or other word all tcodes gives Abap dump.

I tried one parameter :-

Putting this parameter in DEFAULT.PFL
abap/recompile_all = 0

Still issue is the same all tcodes goes to ABAP Dump. Not A Single tcode runs.

I am having 32Gb of RAM & Disk Space is SSD 1Tb

Please kindly help me urgently.

Great Thanks in advance for your prompt reply.

Thanks

Kushal

entry.title: Is it possible to share a link to a library without SSO access?
entry.content:
Hello,

My customer has SSO enabled (for internal staff). 

They want to share a link to an external user who has NOT SSO. The external user can access the manager via manual login, but they cannot click on the link to a library (because SSO is enabled). 

Is there a solution? 

Thanks, Emelie

entry.title: Re: Difference between assigning variable and passing as...
entry.content:
There are stricter checks for method parameters.

If you really want this call, try this:

me->record_sdata( i_sdata = conv #( ls_data ) ).

Since edi_sdata is not a structure, I would suggest writing lv_sdata instead of ls_sdata.

Is it possible to share the details on which import template you used to be able to import fields from a custom portlet? 

I am looking to action a mass import of information into a custom portlet I have created but I cannot find the fields via the 'employee data import; > download template option 

thanks in advance

Abigail

entry.title: Re: Form settings changing often
entry.content: are form settings reset to default on upgrade of an SAP Version?

I am trying to Search emails from a shared mailbox using Outlook 365 Web SDK in SAP Build Process Automation, but I cannot see any option to do that? I see that send email activity does have an option to send email 'On behalf of' but cannot find any such option for Search Email and Get email information. Your expert guidance on the matter is highly appreciated.

Thanks

Karun

SAP Build SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content: OK, now I know the reason - a Control M job ran and deleted the backup file !! It was not MaxDB !!! Please just let me know if the backup file of an online backup contains the logs from the backup duration. Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Cloud ERP - Opportunities, Challenges & SAP's Outreach
entry.content:
In-Depth Series - February 2025

The series aims to provide SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition product deep-dive knowledge, independently from the release update.

Thursday, February 13, 2025

16:00 PM – 17:00 PM CET

Taulia Working Capital Management Solutions

Click Here to Register

Deep dive on Taulia Working Capital Management solutions, specifically Receivables Financing, Supply Chain Finance, Dynamic Discounting and virtual Cards and integration with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with CE2502.

Learning objectives

After participating in this live session, you will understand how Taulia Solutions can help optimizing your working capital and cash flow and the capabilities with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thursday, February 20, 2025

16:00 PM – 16:45 PM CET

SAP Central Business Configuration

Click Here to Register

Overview

1.Overview and New Features

2.Live Demos

3.Additional Resources

4.Q&A

Learning objectives

After participating in this live session, you will understand the latest features in SAP Central Business Configuration.

entry.title: Physical inv & batch management
entry.content:
Hi colleagues

i have question related with PI and batch mgmt.

i exlplain my case:

1. i`ve created PI with: frozen stocks (IKPF -XBUFI) and block posting (IKPF-SPERR) for SL eg. 1000 with all materials (some with batch mgmt., other without).
2. i have created PO for materials
a) with batch management
b) without batch management
3. I went to MIGO and i was not able to GR material without batch - it is ok, but fot material with batch mgmt. system created new batch and allow to make GR.

Counting PI was not started.

Now i wonder Is this the correct operation of the system or should I change something in the configuration. 
I thought that if i marked block posting wouldn`t be able to make GR for this materail general.

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content: I had paid through NEFT payment methos received access today for CER006, so raise a ticket in help center.In India currently you can't buy the CER006 and CER001 through their SAP online cart method.

entry.title: Re: How to access Quote Table values in Responsive UI template with Knockout.js?

entry.title: PFS configuration for a new SF instance - P-user
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are trying to configure PFS for Onb 2.0 for a customer. I have requested the PFS url with my own S-user as a partner but the system shows errors, so most probably a P-user from the customer is necessary. Could you please advise how to create such a P-user? The blog from 2020 seems not to be relevant anymore because we tried with the customer and the steps are not the same in the system

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/creating-a-technical-user-for-cloud-platform-integration/ba-p/13374440

Thank you very much,
Deyana

 

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

entry.title: Re: Enhancement to Update NAST in VA02

entry.title: Re: SoapFault:faultstring=Error reading XMLStreamReader:...
entry.content: Please check RFC destination at S4 end and make sure UTF-8 encoding is used

entry.title: Re: Enhancement to Update NAST in VA02
entry.content: NB: concerning your question, it's what SAP Locks are about, avoiding conflicts occurring at the same time.

entry.title: Re: Binary Attachment file through Form-Data not working...
entry.content:
Hi @nidhi_srivastava22  ,

your form-data body is not properly formatted (like boundary is not defined properly please refer form-data guideline) .Try creating it through groovy script and make sure you converted whole payload to bytes before pushing it to API .  Hope this helps ! Thankyou

entry.title: Error VPK1310 in DP93 - Intercompany Resource Related Billing Process
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have been getting the error VPK1310 "No Expenditure Items Found". A WBS Element which is a billing element is assigned to the sales order. The WBS Element have the costs in CJI3N, which is also defined in Material Determination section of the DIP Profile and we use "Intercompany - Line items" as the source. We are using pricing procedure PSER02 and condition type EK01.

Could you please guide?

entry.title: Re: How to read environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task
entry.content: I'll let @weiss_zhao1 speak for themselves, but the post talked about Script Task in process, but the solution talked about Custom Script in automation.

entry.title: Re: Authentication Issues occur when sending mail to outl...
entry.content: Hallo Ayechan, thanks for reaching out to us, Are you still encountering an issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP IRPA/Build Get Open Workbook List gives more records
entry.content:
Hello Liska,

Thank you for reaching out to us. As a best practice, we recommend starting by closing all open Excel instances and initiating the loop afresh. If a workbook is already open, there is a possibility that Excel may update it incorrectly. Additionally, please ensure that the workbook path is properly maintained.

Let us know if you need further assistance.

entry.title: AP CPI integration - Query filter conditions and null date&time issue!
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to get business partner list of records that created or modified within specific date and time duration.

Example: get all business partners from system that created between 1-1-2025 10:00AM to 1/2/2025 11:00AM  or last changed on 1-1-2025 10:00AM to 1/2/2025 11:00PM

Notes: -

1. SAP business partners thurogh CPI integration has 4 fields for creation date or updated date:

"CreationDate": "2025-01-20T00:00:00.000",
"Customer": "21600031",
"LastChangeDate": "2025-01-21T00:00:00.000",
"BusinessPartner": "21600031",
"CreationTime": "1970-01-01T11:11:16.000",
"LastChangeTime": "1970-01-01T08:45:20.000",

2. LastChangeDate or LastChangeTime will be null in SAP system unless the record is not changed.

My CPI Query option filter is:

$select=Customer,BusinessPartner,Supplier,CreationDate,CreationTime,LastChangeDate,LastChangeTime&$filter=CreationDate ge datetime'${property.CreationDate}'
and (LastChangeDate ne null) or LastChangeDate ge datetime'${property.LastChangeDate}'

when try to consume the cpi return bad request.

Please support by write the right query option filter in order to get all business partners within a specific creation or updating date&time and ignoring the null last change datetime records.

refer to screenshot.

Thanks.

could you please provide some Insite on the requirement which will greatly helpful.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations

Hari

entry.title: Unable to generate PRs for a subset of positions at a corrective maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

A client is having an issue involving the creation of purchase requisitions for a subset of positions while creating a corrective maintenance order in PRD.

As shown in image, the field Res/PurcRq is set to "From release" for both operation 0020 and 0040 when, instead, they should be set to Inmediately, as shown for positions 0030 and 0050.

The user is unable to modify this field.

A deeper view into operation/position 0020 shows no creation of a PR.

Meanwhile, operation 0030 does, indeed, shows a PR being created.

We tried creating a corrective maintenance order in QAS following the same procedure, not having the same error. It's only happening in PRD.

Customizing.

Any thought on how to proceed?

Thanks in advance,

Sebastián

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud Ready Mode: Custom Workflow template in SAP build process automation with S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Frederik,

The out of the box inbox application of MDG cloud ready mode doesn't provide any details which you have mentioned above. You can configure few extra parameters coming from payload like the process ID, type of process, name of the business partner in the build process automation notification step.

I mentioned in my earlier comments that MDG cloud edition inbox app shows lot more details than what MDG cloud ready mode inbox app shows right now. I am sure it's a work in progress and might be enhanced in future releases.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Get all the values in a single line
entry.content:
One possible solution is to use the cross table with the following variables:

v_Standby_C:   =If ([Standby Date] >= RelativeDate(CurrentDate();-3;DayPeriod) And [Standby Date] <= (RelativeDate(CurrentDate();6;DayPeriod ))) Then [Standby Date] 

v_X:   =If ([Standby Date] = [v_Standby_C]) In ([Airtel];[v_Standby_C]) Then "X"

..

I hope it helps and this is what you are looking for

entry.content:
Please check the Blog below to drill down into the explanation of capacity allocation:

entry.title: Unable to open integration suite using trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting the error while trying to open Integration suite using my trial account. Attached the error screenshot.

Kindly help to resolve the issue.

 

Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Re: Physical inv & batch management
entry.content:
Hello @lukkurylo 

As per note 1502321 - Physical Inventory Posting Block Removed

If a material is batch managed then it is possible to make a goods movement posting for the material but for a different batch.

This is because the actual posting block is set on the batch table MCHB (SPERC) and not on table MARD for the material.

So it is the correct system behavior. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @RoosReijers , Issue with  tree security role assignments will be addresses in next release.

Thanks,

Hari

entry.title: Re: PEO - Can't complete Buyoff
entry.content:
Hi,

Maintain the Qualification in 'Business Partner' by using the T-Code PPPM and then check it.

Vasanth.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Connection IP
entry.content:
Sorry for a really late answer.
Today there exist APIs for that, which you can build into your flow
ipify - A Simple Public IP Address API

There is most likely also other services that does the same thing.

entry.title: Re: Is Seamless Planning between SAC and SAP Datasphere a...
entry.content:
Hi @wsamuel 

The seamless planning functionality is available only to the customers and partners who joined the seamles planning controlled release with the SAC QRC4 2024. More information here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/seamless-planning-between-sap-analytics-cloud-and-sap-datasphere-is-coming/ba-p/13877664

The general availability is planned with SAC QRC1 2025. However, access to the functionality with QRC1 is subject to the SAC tenant running on Hana Cloud. More information on Hana Cloud migration is here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-infrastructure-is-moving-to-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13573478

entry.title: Re: On the Urgency of Crypto-Agility
entry.content:
Thanks for the thoughtful article!

Can you clarify whether you're proposing the Crypto Broker to be a separate program, a separate node in a network, a separate thread etc., or is it just a logically distinct component of the application, e.g. a separate Java class?

entry.content: I have a similar problem. I think it's related to OAuth. Does anyone know how to configure OAuth for on-premises?

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
Is there any subscription other than SAP Learning Hub to stay certified?

I am already certified & only want to write the "delta" exams to keep certification active. The full Learning Hub includes exam attempts which are not required.

thanks

entry.title: Striking a Balance: Navigating the Open-Source Tightrope in a World of Evolving Threats - Part 1
entry.content:
By Philip Engelmartin, Technical Advisor, Office of the CSO

 

Understanding the Multifaceted Risks of Open-Source Reliance

Open-source software (OSS) is integral to the software development landscape, renowned for its perceived cost savings, innovation potential, and community collaboration. Nonetheless, heavy reliance on OSS introduces significant risks and complexities that organizations must thoughtfully navigate. This article delves into the numerous risks tied to OSS and underscores the necessity of addressing these challenges to build a more secure and resilient software supply chain.

The Open an Collaborative Nature of OSS: Both Asset and Liability

The open and collaborative nature of OSS development is a double-edged sword. While it drives rapid innovation and promotes community engagement, it also opens doors to vulnerabilities that malicious actors can exploit. These threats extend beyond simple coding errors and manifest in various insidious forms:

Malicious Contributors

One of the most significant risks is the potential for threat actors to disguise themselves as legitimate contributors and inject malicious code directly into OSS projects. Given the decentralized and often anonymous nature of OSS contributions, it becomes challenging to properly vet contributors. Consequently, the introduction and downstream propagation of malicious code become significant risks, compromising the security and integrity of software. The lack of formalized vetting processes in many OSS communities exacerbates this issue, making it easier for bad actors to slip under the radar.

Hidden Backdoors and Logic Bombs

Malicious code can be cunningly hidden within seemingly benign functionalities, activated by a remote command, a specific date, or an event. These concealed threats can leak sensitive data, disrupt operations, or provide unauthorized access to critical systems, potentially causing extensive damage before detection and remediation. The complexity and vast size of many OSS projects make it easier to hide such malicious code, increasing the risk that it will go unnoticed until it is too late.

Supply Chain Vulnerabilities

OSS projects often depend on a complex web of other open-source components, creating a vast attack surface. A single compromised component can trigger cascading effects throughout the ecosystem. Adding to this complexity is the issue of crypto agility - the ability to swiftly adapt to changes in cryptographic algorithms and implementations. Many OSS components rely on cryptography for security but may not be designed for easy upgrades or transitions, leaving software vulnerable [1]. The interconnectedness of OSS projects and their dependencies makes it difficult to track and manage vulnerabilities effectively.

Zero-Day Exploits and Public Disclosure

Vulnerabilities found in OSS are often disclosed publicly, giving malicious actors a window of opportunity to exploit these flaws before patches are developed and deployed. This race against time leaves organizations vulnerable to attacks that exploit these known weaknesses, highlighting the critical importance of prompt and effective vulnerability management [2]. Public disclosure also means that organizations must be ready to act quickly to mitigate risks, which can be challenging given the widespread use of OSS components.

The Log4Shell Incident: A Wake-Up Call

The Log4Shell vulnerability [3], discovered in the widely used Log4j logging library, serves as a stark reminder of the extensive impact a single OSS vulnerability can have. Affecting thousands of organizations globally, this incident underscores the urgent need for a more secure and controlled approach to software development. It emphasizes the necessity of proactive measures and robust security practices to protect against such widespread vulnerabilities that can devastate an organization's security posture.

Unpredictable Lifecycles and Support Gaps

The decentralized and often volunteer-driven nature of OSS development can lead to unpredictable project lifecycles, creating significant challenges for organizations that rely on these components:

Maintenance Gaps and Security Risks

Unsupported or abandoned OSS components are less likely to receive timely security updates, leaving software vulnerable to exploits. This lack of maintenance extends to cryptographic components as well. Without active development, OSS projects may fall behind in implementing the latest cryptographic standards or addressing newly discovered vulnerabilities in existing algorithms, exacerbating security risks. Organizations must invest significant resources in monitoring and maintaining these components to mitigate these risks.

Compatibility Issues and Integration Challenges

Combining OSS components with different versions and dependencies can lead to compatibility issues, requiring considerable engineering effort and potentially impacting software stability. These challenges necessitate rigorous testing and continuous integration practices to ensure seamless and stable software performance. Organizations must be prepared to dedicate substantial resources to managing these integration challenges, which can be particularly burdensome in complex software environments.

Lack of Service Level Agreements (SLAs)

OSS typically does not come with the formal support and SLAs provided by commercial software. This absence leaves organizations to rely on internal resources or community support, which can be inconsistent and unreliable, particularly when dealing with critical issues that demand immediate resolution. Organizations must often invest in building internal expertise to manage these support gaps, which can be a significant drain on resources and expertise.

Conclusion

While OSS offers many benefits, the risks associated with its use can be substantial and often underestimated. Organizations must carefully assess these risks and take proactive steps to mitigate them. Understanding the multifaceted risks is the first step in developing a comprehensive strategy to build a more secure and resilient software supply chain. This approach requires organizations to strike a delicate balance between leveraging the advantages of OSS and implementing robust security measures to protect against evolving threats.

Stay tuned for the next article in this series, where we explore the complexities of OSS licensing and geopolitical influences.

[1] https://sweet32.info/  
[2] https://www.threatdown.com/blog/five-years-later-heartbleed-vulnerability-still-unpatched/  
[3] https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/cve-2021-44228

entry.title: Re: Form template name cant be initial error while output...
entry.content: The PDF file for revise payment proposal is not being generated. Please assist to check.

entry.title: Re: SAP AIF use Idoc field value as input for a function
entry.content:
Hi Pascal,

this is not possible. 

Which release are you using? With the fiori monitoring UIs we have introduced key field functions. With the key field function you can add a forward navigation based on the content of a key field (the feature is only available for AIFs Fiori Monitoring UIs).

Best Regards

Britta

entry.title: Re: Error when uploading Data in the Manage Lookup Table...
entry.content:
Hi Lukas,

the original error message indicates that ranges are used. 
In your screenshot you've provided only the price condition columns.
Could you maybe post a screenshot with all columns and the row which produces the error? You might want to blur some sensitive information like product codes if required.

For the price condition in your screenshot I can tell you that Tier-based price conditions require also the columns
price (Amount Currency), price (Pricing Unit Value) and price (Pricing Unit UoM or Currency), e.g.

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content:
@anilmuppa9  Could you please let me know more details on that feature request ? It will really help.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: 32bit crystal reports .net runtime discontinued in De...
entry.content: Thank you, Don, for your response and it was very helpful in clarifying how to move over to 64bit using VS2019. We are definitely migrating but the issue for us is the timing. We may not be able to perform the conversion with ample time for implementation and testing this year, so we are really looking for some kind of assurance if we continue utilizing the 32 bit runtime into 2026 as we complete the conversion. In my experience, discontinued or out of support components can continue to function as expected assuming the runtime environment stays the same. I am assuming unless SAP has implemented a 'kill switch' for the 32bit runtime that will shut it down exactly in Dec 2025, the same can be said for this. However, also knowing how things work, SAP probably can't give any guarantees past Dec 2025 regarding the 32bit runtime. So what I'm looking for is a statement from SAP that says past Dec 2025 we cannot give any guarantees, however, there is no immediate kill switch on the 32bit runtime and as far as we know things should continue to work given your runtimes environments stay the same. With this statement, that would give us an additional time into 2026 where we can complete the conversion. Please advise and thank you again for your assistance, Don.

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Thanks @hariprasadgud ,

For splitting bundle permissions I have created an influence request, https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/339319.

It is auto assigned to Fannie Guan as it relates to RBP.

entry.title: Re: list of items field is not displaying (SAP b1)
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try also, in the List Item screen, click on menu "View -> Restore Column Width".

Maybe the column is there, but with the width = zero.

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
Hi @nickv23 
Learners can get and stay certified with one single subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub. A subscription provides you access to all resources you need to prepare for certifications, take the certification exams with four attempts included and stay certified with access to yearly assessments. 

In addition, you can also purchase one or six SAP Certification exam attempts. To stay certified, you have a simple path with a subscription to SAP Learning Hub, with access to short and easy yearly assessments.

Kind regards
Margit

 

Alternatively, if you don’t have an SAP Learning Hub subscription, you still have the option to purchase and retake an SAP Certification exam every year.
